extension.name: AI Boost for YooTheme Pro
extension.author: AI Boost Team
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: AI Boost add-on for YooTheme Pro. Requires AI Boost for Joomla (Basic or Professional). Provides: FAQPage schema from YooTheme Accordion, ImageGallery schema from Gallery widgets, OpenGraph override from YooTheme page meta, and sitemap exclusion of builder-only pages.
